message:
Optimize JSON parse: 22% faster with lookup tables and bulk copy

Parse benchmark (50K × 62KB):
- Before: 10.5s (1.71x slower than Rust)
- After: 8.1s (1.33x slower than Rust)

Optimizations:
- Comptime hex lookup table for \uXXXX (like Rust serde_json)
- Comptime escape character lookup table
- Bulk memcpy between escapes instead of byte-by-byte append
- Pre-allocate result buffer (no ArrayList growth)

files.patch:

+| PyAOT | 8.1s ± 0.2s | 1.56x |
